title: How to Create Winning Freelance Proposals? (Ready AI Pipeline)
summary: A video demonstrating Venngage's AI Proposal Generator tool for creating branded, client-ready freelance proposals. The tool uses a single prompt to generate initial drafts and offers refinement options including brand customization, AI writing assistance, and accessibility checking before export.
